text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is hard at work training for the Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, she learns that her friend, Silence
Suzuka, will be entering the same race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka explains that she's on a search to find the
"something" that she's missing by challenging
herself with various races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the knowledge that she'll be running against
her rival, Taiki Shuttle's excitement is through the
roof. She gives our training sessions her undivided
attention.
